factors.detail: Criticality is High and raises migration risk tolerance requirements.
Technology debt includes 1 EOL and 2 outdated component(s).
The application exposes 5 API endpoints and 20 external interfaces.
Deployment includes on-premise infrastructure, increasing migration and network dependency complexity.
Database size is 5000GB, increasing cutover and data migration effort.
The workload is not containerized, reducing portability and slowing platform transitions.
